pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 14-17 checks for 'views.view.catalog_search'; verifier.py line 49 confirms view name as 'catalog_search'
Task description requires 'path /search/catalog'; export_result.sh line 29 checks 'http://localhost/search/catalog'; verifier.py line 67 checks path == 'search/catalog'
Task description line 5 explicitly states 'Add a menu link titled Search to the Main navigation menu'; verifier.py line 135 expects 'Menu link Search exists'
Task description lines 3-4 require 'Relationship to Product variations'; verifier.py line 85 checks for 'variations' in relationship field/id/table
Task description line 3 requires 'search by Title AND by SKU'; verifier.py lines 110-127 checks for both title and sku exposed filters; export_result.sh lines 52-66 tests both parameters

privileged_info_summary: The task deploys a Drupal Views-based product search page using synthetically-generated product data from seed_products.php containing 12 tech products (e.g., Sony WH-1000XM5 with SKU SONY-WH1000XM5, Logitech MX Master 3S with SKU LOGI-MXM3S). The view is named 'catalog_search' with page path 'search/catalog'. It requires exposed Title and SKU filters (SKU on Product Variation entity via a variations relationship) and a 'Search' menu link in Main Navigation. The verifier checks 8 criteria: view existence (10 pts), path (10 pts), relationship (25 pts), title filter (15 pts), SKU filter (20 pts), menu link (10 pts), HTTP 200 status (5 pts), and functional search (5 pts), with 70 pts passing threshold.
